pr_text:
## Title: Fix deadlock in M2AP message handling by removing duplicate responses

### Summary
Fix a deadlock caused by inconsistent lock acquisition ordering in M2AP message processing. The ENB_APP layer was sending duplicate responses for MBMS session control messages that are already handled by the RRC layer. Since RRC holds `cell_info_mutex` while processing these messages and sending its own responses, the duplicate responses from ENB_APP created a race condition leading to deadlock. This pat
